1.1: Bram — keeps the Beaten Drum at the lower edge of Oakhollow; learned on arrival, as travellers do.

2.2: Oakhollow at the edge of Thornwood.
2.4: The Greymarch toll and its bronze guild-mark — a pedlar's knowledge of the roads.

content._: What Anya has come to know — the names and terms recognisable. The soft reads this to decide who can be named; absence means perceived by appearance, and a learned name is appended here.
